title: Prepare and publish release v0.5.30
outOfScope: Publishing any tag other than v0.5.30
Deleting immutable release evidence or historical Work Items

sources.reason: Current release identity v0.5.29 and supply-chain contract.
Exact-SHA release workflow and publication gates.
Documented release preparation and publication boundary.

problemStatement: Tasks 1–9 are complete, but the Conditional GO cycle still requires the explicitly approved next release v0.5.30 to be prepared, validated, and published from one immutable main SHA.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: release.json declares exactly v0.5.30 and it is exactly one patch after the public v0.5.29 tag.
The candidate source passes quality, compatibility, release evidence, and public distribution checks before publication.
The GitHub release is published only for the verified immutable source SHA with matching assets.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item publishes an external immutable tag and GitHub Release.

executionDecision.reason: The maintainer explicitly approved target version v0.5.30 and production publication.

preReviewWarnings: Do not publish a tag other than v0.5.30.
Use the exact merged main SHA and preserve the workflow's blocking gates.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record explicit version approval, immutable source identity, and publication evidence.

acceptance: The next version is explicitly selected as v0.5.30 and recorded in release.json.
Quality, compatibility, exact-ref Smoke, Release Asset Authority, and public asset integrity checks pass.
The GitHub Release is published only for the verified immutable source SHA with matching release assets.
The final Summary records version, tag, source SHA, release URL, asset digests, Smoke run, and public checker result.
guidelines: Keep release identity exact and never infer a version from a moving branch.
Treat the GitHub workflow as the publication authority and preserve its fail-closed gates.
Do not claim external trust beyond the evidence actually published.

intent.problem: The Conditional GO cycle needs one verified next release after the completed remediation tasks.
intent.rationale: An exact approved patch release closes the release gate while retaining source and asset traceability.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly confirmed production publication of v0.5.30.

rollbackNote: Before publication, revert the candidate release.json change. After tag publication, do not rewrite the immutable tag; use a new corrective release if required.
